steps.description: Click the "Customize Your Order" button located below the "Current Order" section in the Coffee Agent interface, within Microsoft Teams.
Type text: 'test' into the 'Your Name' input field within the "Coffee Agent" dialog on Microsoft Teams.
Click on the dropdown field labeled "Select Your Drink" in the "Coffee Agent" dialog within the Microsoft Teams application interface.
Click on the "Cold Brew (large)" option from the dropdown menu under "Select Your Drink" in the "Coffee Agent" form displayed in the Microsoft Teams web application interface.
Click the "Submit Your Order" button in the Coffee Agent popup window, located within the Microsoft Teams interface.
Click the "Close" button (red cross icon) in the "Coffee Agent - Submit Your Order" confirmation dialog within the Microsoft Teams application interface to dismiss the message.
Click on the text input field labeled "Type a message" in the Microsoft Teams Coffee Agent chat interface to initiate a message.

parameters.text: I want to add a coffee shop

steps.description: Type the text "I want to add a coffee shop" into the input text field at the bottom of the chat pane in the Coffee Agent interface within Microsoft Teams.
Press the Enter key to submit the message "I want to add a coffee shop" in the chat input field of the Coffee Agent interface within Microsoft Teams.
@assertion  "I'll add the coffee shop to your list" exist
Click the "Close" (X) button at the top-right corner of the Google Chrome window to close the Microsoft Teams web application tab displaying the "contact-exporterdev" interface.
